arts.sum: Hansi Flick has named a 24 man squad for the first leg of Barça's Champions League last 16 tie against Benfica. Hansi Flick's side trained at the stadium – the venue for the first leg of their last 16 tie (kick off 9pm CET) – for the final time before Wednesday's game in Lisbon.

arts.ttl: Benfica star insists he's ignoring Man Utd transfer clause amid Ruben Amorim demands
arts.sum: Manchester United have been tipped to re-sign Benfica left-back Alvaro Carreras, who never made a first-team appearance for the Red Devils but has excelled in Portugal

arts.ttl: Benfica vs Barcelona – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Benfica host Barcelona in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie tonight. Bruno Lage’s side will be out for revenge at The Estádio da Luz. In January, Benfica lost a Champions League classic against Barcelona in the Portuguese capital. arts.ttl: Man United 'eyeing £67m move' for Barcelona's pass master who could be the ideal midfield partner for Manuel Ugarte
arts.sum: Manchester United are allegedly preparing to move for Barcelona midfielder Marc Casado during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Barcelona XI vs Benfica – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Barcelona continue their Champions League crusade against Benfica in Lisbon this evening. The Spanish side cross the border to take on Benfica in the first leg of their last-16 tie. It’s a rematch of an astonishing league phase meeting between the sides. arts.ttl: Jorge Mendes makes statement on Lamine Yamal contract – ‘We only spoke about Lamine’
arts.sum: Barcelona star Lamine Yamal is arguably the most valuable asset the club has currently, but that status naturally comes with a wage rise for the 17-year-old. A significant one. arts.ttl: Agent Jorge Mendes publicly addresses exit for Barcelona star – ‘He needs to play now’
arts.sum: Barcelona forward Ansu Fati has had a tough few seasons, hampered by injuries and more recently, without the chance to play much. arts.ttl: Sensational Neymar to Barcelona transfer return NOT ruled out by boss Hansi Flick
arts.sum: The Brazilian superstar only recently re-signed with boyhood club Santos but is said to be pushing for a return to the Nou Camp
